projects.title: IoT Biometric Pulse & Oxygen Tracker
projects.description: Developed a biometric monitoring system using a Raspberry Pi and a Pulse Oximeter sensor to capture and analyze real-time heart rate and oxygen saturation (SpO₂) data.

projects.title: Adaptive Seismic Alert System
projects.description: Successfully pivoted from a sign-language translation glove to a functional earthquake detector in under 48 hours after hardware failure. Re-engineered motion sensors and hardware logic to meet presentation requirements.

projects.title: Projekti Honeypot
projects.description: Led a team of six to architect a multi-node honeynet using Cowrie, Suricata, and OpenWrt, conducting a full-scale Red Team/Blue Team simulation to analyze real-time intrusion detection and adversary behavior.

certifications.name: Fortinet NSE3
certifications.description: Network Security Associate certification demonstrating expertise in Fortinet Firewall administration.

certifications.name: AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials
certifications.description: Foundational cloud computing knowledge and AWS services understanding.

certifications.name: Cisco Introduction to Cybersecurity
certifications.description: Comprehensive introduction to cybersecurity concepts and best practices.

certifications.name: Junction Hackathon 2025

certifications.name: Google Prompting Essentials
